What this is

A preview of a duplicate-ready Notion client tracker organized around the public workflow visible on the site.

Public workflow used

Private Baseball Instructor, 1-on-1 hitting, fielding, pitching, catching, Enhanced travel team practice training, 20 Minute Call — no cost — Mentor sessions are optional phone/web calls

This week at Ryan Roberts Baseball Registration + roster board Abram B. Record Registration + Volunteer View Season Calendar + Tryout Window Season Closeout + Re-enrollment View Setup Map

Why this shape

From overview to usable workspace

The first screenshots show the main views. The later screenshots show the editable structure that would be delivered: fields, focused tables, individual client pages, and starter records.

What it helps with

  • One athlete board replaces the Wix contact form + email follow-up + separate cage-rental coordination
  • Sessions-remaining counter for every Try It / Advanced / Pro / Elite package so families and Ryan see the same ledger
  • Mentor-session scheduling lives next to in-person lessons instead of on a second calendar

1. This week at Ryan Roberts Baseball

This week at Ryan Roberts Baseball

Active athletes, sessions booked this week, pending consults, and the day's hitting/fielding/mentor blocks — one snapshot replacing a contact-form inbox and a cage-rental text thread.

2. Registration + roster board

Registration + roster board

Every athlete moves left-to-right: New consult → Package selected → Facility booked → Active package → Mentor call due → Package complete. One place for 20-minute consults instead of scattered form submissions.

Open this view

3. Abram B. Record

Abram B. Record

Per-athlete page: age division, focus area, package and sessions remaining, consult notes, session log, mentor-call history, facility and gear notes, parent communication preferences.

Open this view

4. Registration + Volunteer View

Registration + Volunteer View

Confirm a package is ready to start in one screen: consult complete, plan selected, cage booked, waiver signed, payment in, mentor cadence set — and any team-parent role noted for travel-team work.

Open this view

5. Season Calendar + Tryout Window

Season Calendar + Tryout Window

This week's lessons, the April–May tryout prep window, the June summer clinic block, and Ryan's travel/blackout dates — all on one timeline with facility confirmations.

Open this view

6. Season Closeout + Re-enrollment View

Season Closeout + Re-enrollment View

After every package: progress recap, tournament/tryout outcome notes, and a next-step prompt — Pro Plan renewal, summer clinic slot, or Elite upgrade — so returning families don't restart intake.

Open this view

7. Setup Map

Setup Map

Six-step setup: duplicate the template, load the four package tiers, import current athletes, add the facility rotation, turn on the sessions-remaining counter, and publish the short inquiry form.
